originalTitle: 007 First Light is already discounted for the PS5 and Steam
summary: IO Interactive’s 007 First Light is here, and it’s just as stunning a James Bond mov — err, video game — as we hoped it would be. Pardon the confusion, the title’s engaging tutorial really feels like you’re watching a great Bond movie at times. Whether you’re a longtime Hitman fan who’s been eagerly waiting […]
content: IO Interactive’s 007 First Light is here, and it’s just as stunning a James Bond mov — err, video game — as we hoped it would be. Pardon the confusion, the title’s engaging tutorial really feels like you’re watching a great Bond movie at times. Whether you’re a longtime Hitman fan who’s been eagerly waiting for the studio’s latest game or not, there are deals to be had on both the PlayStation 5 and Steam PC versions. [Product: 007 First Light | https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.costco.com%2Fp%2F-%2F007-first-light-playstation-5%2F4201018230%2F, https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://www.fanatical.com/en/game/007-first-light, https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://www.fanatical.com/en/game/007-first-light-deluxe-edition] Costco members, for instance, can already take advantage of an online-only deal on the disc-based PS5 version, which knocks it down to $62.99 (originally $69.99). It’s not a big discount, but it’s currently the best out there across major retailers. If you have a desktop PC or handheld gaming PC powerful enough to run the game, the Steam version is a little cheaper at Fanatical. The standard digital edition is going for $60.89, while the deluxe digital edition, which includes in-game cosmetics, is down to $69.59 (about $10 off). First Light is similar in a sense to recent Hitman games. It’s a third-person stealth sandbox game, after all, but it has a little more in common with Naughty Dog’s Uncharted series thanks to its hand-to-hand combat system, quippy protagonist, and wide variety of missions that either have you on foot using fun gadgets or behind the wheel of a muscle car. Read our full 007 First Light review.
chineseTitle: 《007 曙光》PS5 和 Steam 已打折
chineseSummary: IO Interactive 的 007 First Light 来了，它就像詹姆斯·邦德电影（呃，电子游戏）一样令人惊叹，正如我们所希望的那样。请原谅我的困惑，标题中引人入胜的教程有时真的感觉就像您正在观看一部精彩的邦德电影。无论您是热切等待的《杀手》长期粉丝 [...]
chineseContent: IO Interactive 的 007 First Light 来了，它就像詹姆斯·邦德电影（呃，电子游戏）一样令人惊叹，正如我们所希望的那样。请原谅我的困惑，标题中引人入胜的教程有时真的感觉就像您正在观看一部精彩的邦德电影。无论您是否是《杀手》的长期粉丝，是否一直在热切等待工作室的最新游戏，PlayStation 5 和 Steam PC 版本都有优惠。 [产品：007 第一道曙光 | https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.costco.com%2Fp%2F-%2F007-first-light-playstation-5%2F4201018230%2F， https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://www.fanatical.com/en/game/007-first-light、https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://www.fanatical.com/en/game/007-first-light-deluxe-edition] 例如，Costco 会员已经可以利用PS5 光盘版仅在线交易，价格降至 62.99 美元（原价 69.99 美元）。这不是一个很大的折扣，但它是目前主要零售商中最好的折扣。如果您有足够强大的台式电脑或手持游戏电脑来运行游戏，Fanatical 上的 Steam 版本会便宜一些。标准数字版售价为 60.89 美元，而包含游戏内化妆品的豪华数字版则降至 69.59 美元（约优惠 10 美元）。 《黎明曙光》在某种意义上与最近的《杀手》游戏类似。毕竟，这是一款第三人称潜行沙盒游戏，但它与顽皮狗的《神秘海域》系列有更多共同点，因为它的肉搏战系统、俏皮的主角以及各种各样的任务，要么让你步行使用有趣的小工具，要么驾驶肌肉车。阅读我们完整的 007 曙光评论。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
